…only further validates my growing belief that women shouldn’t have the right to vote, when their gullibility is being actively weaponized in a desperate attempt to stop the SAVE Act.

When they can’t be even bothered to ask ChatGPT or Grok if it’s true, and just believe what they’re told on their right to vote, it just goes to show they can’t be trusted in general to make an informed decision on just about anything else.
